message:
bd-2im: Implement DDL syntax highlighting for schema output

Add DdlDisplay renderable with SQL dialect support (PostgreSQL, SQLite,
MySQL), change region highlighting for diffs, and dual-mode rendering.
Features include:

- SqlDialect enum with dialect-specific DDL keywords (SERIAL, AUTOINCREMENT, etc.)
- ChangeKind and ChangeRegion for diff highlighting (Added/Removed/Modified)
- render_plain() for plain text output with optional line numbers
- render() for rich terminal output with syntax highlighting
- Full test coverage with 30 unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
